overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City. The character traverses a neon-lit urban canyon with elevated monorail tracks, crosses a busy intersection with passing vehicles, and approaches a hotel entrance beneath an overpass. The footage features high-fidelity ray-traced graphics with vibrant cyan and magenta neon signage contrasting against concrete brutalist architecture.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the narrow street following an NPC pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in gray jacket walking ahead of ego along the sidewalk

heavy concrete and steel monorail tracks running overhead between buildings

dark facade building with illuminated signage and balconies

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow cyberpunk street flanked by towering buildings covered in neon signage. The camera follows a pedestrian walking ahead, passing concrete barriers and a red vending machine while elevated monorail tracks loom overhead. The atmosphere is dense with urban infrastructure and glowing advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with yellow crosswalk and vehicle traffic

events.description: exits narrow street into open intersection with tall buildings on both sides
begins crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk as vehicles approach
black sedan and other vehicles pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection via the yellow crosswalk while monitoring traffic

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection from right to left
silver sports car waiting at the intersection

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with thick yellow stripes on asphalt
tall curved residential tower with repetitive balcony patterns
modern glass and concrete high-rise with reflective windows
large illuminated hotel sign with Japanese text visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow street into a sunlit urban intersection. They cross the yellow-striped crosswalk while vehicles pass by, with tall high-rise buildings framing the view. The hotel sign becomes visible in the distance as the scene opens up to the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza with hotel approach and digital advertising

events.description: enters open plaza area with palm tree planters and curved building facades
slight turn toward the hotel entrance while navigating around pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking through the commercial plaza toward the hotel, passing various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red tank top walking toward the camera
group of pedestrians walking near the hotel entrance

entered.detail: large curved digital screen displaying purple and pink advertisements
rounded commercial building with multiple levels of signage
large concrete planter with palm trees in the plaza center
curved concrete ramp leading up to the elevated highway
tall digital advertising pillar with rotating displays

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a bustling commercial plaza with palm tree planters and curved buildings covered in digital billboards. The hotel sign grows larger as they approach, navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic. The environment features a mix of natural sunlight and neon advertising.

scene_state.functional_zone: hotel entrance beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: approaches hotel entrance passing under the shadow of the concrete overpass
walking toward the covered hotel entrance area

agents.ego_description: approaching the hotel entrance under the overpass, passing pedestrians near the entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrians gathered near the hotel entrance
pedestrian with red hair and white top walking along the wall

entered.detail: covered entranceway to the hotel with red accent lighting
massive concrete highway overpass casting shadow over the area
large flat digital billboard showing animated advertisements

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character approaching the hotel entrance beneath a massive concrete overpass that blocks the sky. The lighting shifts to artificial neon as they near the entrance, where several pedestrians are gathered. The hotel sign is now prominent and close, marking the destination of the walk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, neon-lit urban canyon into a bright city plaza before ending beneath a massive concrete overpass. It begins by following a pedestrian through a narrow street flanked by towering buildings and glowing advertisements, moving past concrete barriers and a red vending machine under looming monorail tracks. As the character emerges from the alley, the scene opens up into a sunlit intersection where they cross a yellow-striped crosswalk framed by high-rise buildings. The camera then glides through a bustling commercial plaza filled with palm tree planters and digital billboards, with the hotel sign growing larger in the distance. Finally, the lighting shifts back to artificial neon as the character approaches the hotel entrance, moving beneath the heavy shadow of a concrete overpass where a crowd of pedestrians has gathered.
